name: Restaurante
description: Sitio web elegante para restaurantes, cafes y negocios gastronómicos

grapesjs.html:
La Buena Mesa
NosotrosCartaGaleríaHorariosReservar

Cocina de Autor

La Buena Mesa

Una experiencia gastronómica única donde la tradición se encuentra con la innovación. Ingredientes frescos, recetas con alma.

Reservar Mesa

Nuestra Historia

Pasión por la buena cocina desde 1998

Fundado por la Chef María González, nuestro restaurante nació con la visión de ofrecer una cocina que honra las raíces latinoamericanas con técnicas contemporáneas. Cada plato cuenta una historia y cada ingrediente es seleccionado con cuidado de productores locales.

Nuestro compromiso es simple: servir comida honesta, preparada con amor y los mejores ingredientes de temporada.

Chef María González

Fundadora & Chef Ejecutiva

Nuestra Carta

Platos Destacados

Preparados diariamente con ingredientes frescos y de temporada

Ceviche Clásico

$14.500

Corvina fresca marinada en limón, cebolla morada, cilantro y ají. Servido con camote y choclo.

Risotto de Hongos

$16.900

Arroz arborio cremoso con mix de hongos silvestres, parmesano añejo y aceite de trufa.

Lomo al Malbec

$22.900

Lomo vetado a la parrilla con reducción de Malbec, puré trufado y vegetales asados.

Tiradito Nikkei

$13.500

Láminas de salmón con salsa de maracuyá y soya, topped con chips de ajo crocantes.

Pasta Negra al Marisco

$18.500

Tallarines al nero di sepia con camarones, calamares y mejillones en salsa de vino blanco.

Crème Brûlée

$8.500

Clásica crema quemada con vainilla de Madagascar y frutos rojos de temporada.

a{font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);text-decoration:none;font-weight:400;transition:color 0.2s;font-family:'Lato',sans-serif;}.resto-nav-links a:hover{color:#fbbf24;}.resto-nav-cta{background:#d97706!important;color:#fff!important;padding:10px 24px;border-radius:6px;font-weight:600!important;transition:background 0.2s!important;}.resto-nav-cta:hover{background:#b45309!important;}.resto-hero{position:relative;height:90vh;min-height:600px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:url('https://picsum.photos/seed/restaurant-hero/1600/900') center/cover no-repeat;}.resto-hero-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(28,25,23,0.5) 0%,rgba(28,25,23,0.7) 100%);}.resto-hero-content{position:relative;text-align:center;color:#fff;max-width:700px;padding:0 Display',serif;font-size:72px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:20px;}.resto-hero-subtitle{font-family:'Lato',sans-serif;font-size:18px;line-height:1.7;opacity:0.9;margin-bottom:36px;}.resto-btn-primary{display:inline-block;padding:14px 36px;background:#d97706;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;font-size:15px;font-family:'Lato',sans-serif;transition:all 0.2s;letter-spacing:0.5px;}.resto-btn-primary:hover{background:#b45309;transform:translateY(-1px);}.resto-btn-outline{display:inline-block;padding:14px 36px;background:transparent;color:#d97706;border:2px solid #d97706;border-radius:6px;text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;font-size:15px;font-family:'Lato',sans-serif;transition:all 0.2s;letter-spacing:0.5px;}.resto-btn-outline:hover{background:#d97706;color:#fff;}.resto-container{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 24px;}.resto-section-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:56px;}.resto-section-label{font-family:'Lato',sans-serif;font-size:14px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:3px;color:#d97706;margin-bottom:12px;}.resto-section-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:42px;font-weight:700;color:#1c1917;margin-bottom:16px;}.resto-section-subtitle{font-size:17px;color:#78716c;max-width:600px;margin:0 auto;}.resto-about{padding:100px 0;background:#fffbeb;}.resto-about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:64px;align-items:center;}.resto-about-text{}.resto-about-label{font-family:'Lato',sans-serif;font-size:14px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:3px;color:#d97706;margin-bottom:12px;}.resto-about-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:38px;font-weight:700;color:#1c1917;margin-bottom:24px;line-height:1.2;}.resto-about-desc{font-size:16px;color:#57534e;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:16px;}.resto-about-signature{margin-top:24px;padding-top:24px;border-top:1px solid #e7e5e4;}.resto-signature-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#1c1917;}.resto-signature-role{font-size:14px;color:#a8a29e;}.resto-about-image{}.resto-img-rounded{width:100%;height:auto;border-radius:12px;object-fit:cover;}.resto-menu{padding:100px 0;background:#fefce8;}.resto-menu-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:28px;}.resto-menu-card{background:#fff;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;transition:all 0.3s;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);}.resto-menu-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);}.resto-menu-img{width:100%;height:220px;object-fit:cover;}.resto-menu-info{padding:20px;}.resto-menu-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px;}.resto-menu-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:#1c1917;}.resto-menu-price{font-family:'Lato',sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:#d97706;}.resto-menu-desc{font-size:14px;color:#78716c;line-height:1.6;}.resto-gallery{padding:100px 0;background:#fffbeb;}.resto-gallery-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;}.resto-gallery-img{width:100%;height:280px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:10px;transition:transform 0.3s;}.resto-gallery-img:hover{transform:scale(1.02);}.resto-gallery-wide{grid-column:span 2;}.resto-hours{padding:100px 0;background:#1c1917;color:#fff;}.resto-hours .resto-section-title{color:#fff;}.resto-hours-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:64px;align-items:center;}.resto-hours-info{}.resto-hours-table{margin:32px 0;}.resto-hours-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:14px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);}.resto-hours-day{font-weight:600;color:#fbbf24;}.resto-hours-time{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);}.resto-contact-info{margin:28px 0;}.resto-contact-info p{margin-bottom:8px;font-size:15px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);}.resto-contact-info strong{color:#fbbf24;}.resto-map{width:100%;height:400px;border:none;border-radius:12px;}.resto-reservation{padding:80px 0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d97706 0%,#92400e 100%);}.resto-reservation-inner{text-align:center;max-width:600px;margin:0 auto;}.resto-reservation-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:38px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:16px;}.resto-reservation-text{font-size:18px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);margin-bottom:32px;}.resto-reservation-buttons{display:flex;gap:16px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;}.resto-reservation-buttons .resto-btn-primary{background:#1c1917;}.resto-reservation-buttons .resto-btn-primary:hover{background:#292524;}.resto-reservation-buttons .resto-btn-outline{color:#fff;border-color:#fff;}.resto-reservation-buttons .resto-btn-outline:hover{background:#fff;color:#92400e;}.resto-footer{padding:64px 0 32px;background:#1c1917;color:#a8a29e;}.resto-footer-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:48px;margin-bottom:48px;}.resto-footer-logo{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:24px;font-weight:700;color:#fbbf24;margin-bottom:8px;}.resto-footer-tagline{font-size:14px;color:#78716c;}.resto-footer-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;}.resto-footer-heading{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em;margin-bottom:4px;}.resto-footer-col a{font-size:14px;color:#a8a29e;text-decoration:none;transition:color 0.2s;}.resto-footer-col a:hover{color:#fbbf24;}.resto-footer-bottom{border-top:1px solid #292524;padding-top:24px;text-align:center;font-size:13px;color:#57534e;}@media(max-width:768px){.resto-hero-title{font-size:44px;}.resto-about-grid,.resto-hours-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.resto-menu-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.resto-gallery-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.resto-gallery-wide{grid-column:span 1;}.resto-footer-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:32px;}.resto-nav-links{display:none;}.resto-hero{min-height:500px;height:70vh;}}
